column1: # related_acts.tsv — hand-maintained kinship relations between tracked acts (#174).
# One row per membership/kinship relation that co-listening similarity data
# can't see (fronts, member-of, successor-of, sibling…). Domain content, not
# tool configuration — currently consumed by tools/research/graph/
# artist-graph.html, and available to any future consumer (artist modal
# cross-links, builder). Relation is freeform display text. Consumers skip
# rows where either endpoint doesn't resolve to a tracked artist, so a row may
# safely predate an artist's tracking. Names resolve through the standard
# normalization (recommend_aliases.tsv applies) — alias-fused pairs (e.g.
# Daniel Donato's Cosmic Country) need no row here; they're already one entity.
# Via-bill kinship (TajMo, SatchVai, etc.) is NOT duplicated here — consumers
# derive those from artists.tsv's Via column, which stays authoritative per
# the #103 protocol.
# Not in-page-editable; comment block is safe (same convention as
# recommend_aliases.tsv).
Artist A
Oliver Wood
Kim Wilson
Warren Haynes
Ivan Neville
Joey Landreth
